data.title: Eurozone February PPI Declines by 0.7%
data.description: The Eurozone's Producer Price Index (PPI) for February decreased by 0.7%, meeting expectations, according to Jin10. The previous month's figure was revised from 0.70% to 0.8%.

data.title: Eurozone February Retail Sales Growth Revised to 2.1%
data.description: Eurozone retail sales for February showed a year-on-year growth rate of 1.7%, matching expectations, according to Jin10. The previous value was revised from 2.00% to 2.1%, indicating a slight upward adjustment in the retail sector's performance for the month.

data.title: A whale deposited $7.86 million into Hyperliquid and purchased 200,000 HYPE tokens.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited $7.86 million into Hyperliquid and bought 200,042 HYPE tokens at a price of $39.29 per coin.

data.title: Crude Oil Decline: Trader Profits $2 Million from Short Position
data.description: A trader known as Loracle successfully closed a $5 million short position on crude oil perpetual contracts, securing a $2 million profit. According to NS3.AI, this move came after crude oil prices dropped over 15%, falling below $100 per barrel early Wednesday. Arkham Intelligence identified the trade as being executed on Hyperliquid, where the volume for WTI crude oil perpetuals reached $2.45 billion in the past 24 hours.

data.title: Whale Invests $7.86 Million in HyperLiquid for HYPE Tokens
data.description: A significant transaction was observed on April 8, as a whale deposited $7.86 million into HyperLiquid. According to BlockBeats, the funds were used to purchase approximately 200,000 HYPE tokens at an average price of $39.29 each.

data.title: Ethereum Plans Quantum-Safe Transition by 2029 Amid Potential Threats
data.description: Ethereum is preparing for a quantum-safe transition by 2029, acknowledging the potential risks posed by quantum computers. According to NS3.AI, while the threat from quantum technology is considered real, it is not seen as immediate. The transition is described as a multiyear network upgrade, aimed at protecting private keys and securing billions of dollars from future quantum advancements.

data.title: China's National Energy Administration Emphasizes Renewable Energy Development
data.description:
On March 31, the National Energy Administration of China held a monthly meeting to discuss the development and construction of renewable energy power for March. According to Jin10, the meeting highlighted the importance of several key tasks for the year, marking the beginning of the 'Fifteenth Five-Year Plan.'

Firstly, the administration stressed the need to continue efforts in expanding investment in renewable energy. Secondly, it emphasized the importance of coordinated efforts in the consumption of new energy. Local energy authorities are urged to balance external and local new energy development, strengthen the fulfillment of long-term power purchase agreements, and stabilize expectations for new energy consumption. Power grid companies are encouraged to increase grid investment and optimize dispatch management to enhance new energy consumption capacity. Power generation companies are advised to make rational judgments and plan project layouts reasonably.

Thirdly, the administration called for the promotion of new models and business formats tailored to local conditions. Local energy authorities should explore new models such as direct green electricity connections and zero-carbon parks, expanding the non-electric consumption space for new energy.

Lastly, the administration highlighted the need for both internal and external improvements to enhance the market competitiveness of new energy companies. It noted that comprehensive participation in market transactions by new energy companies is an inevitable trend.

data.title: A suspected insider, using a Polymarket wallet cluster, profited $600,000 by betting on a US-Iran ceasefire.
data.description: A Polymarket wallet cluster profited $600,000 by betting on a US-Iran ceasefire. This cluster is linked to a wider network of suspected insiders who trade geopolitical events with unusual accuracy. These accounts are connected to a larger cluster that previously profited approximately $1.2 million by betting on a US strike against Iran. They typically use wallets with newly deposited funds to place "YES" bets on specific dates like February 28th, hours before the event, and accurately predicted events such as attacks on Iranian nuclear facilities, Israeli strikes against Iran, and US strikes against Iran. (SolanaFloor)

data.title: Bitget Launchpool will soon launch the project Midnight (NIGHT), with a total prize pool of 12,000,000 NIGHT tokens.
data.description: Bitget Launchpool will soon launch the Midnight (NIGHT) project, with a total prize pool of 12,000,000 NIGHT tokens. The staking period is from April 9th, 19:00 to April 16th, 19:00 (UTC+8). This Launchpool round includes two staking pools: BGB Staking Pool: Total airdrop amount: 11,250,000 NIGHT tokens; NIGHT VIP user staking limit: 50,000; BGB regular user staking limit: 5,000; BGBNIGHT Staking Pool: Total airdrop amount: 750,000; NIGHT individual staking limit: 10,000,000 NIGHT tokens.

data.title: CZ: The old phone number had been out of service for many years; the new owner is suspected to be a hacker or police officer.
data.description: CZ posted on the X platform that his old phone number had been deactivated years ago, and the new owner is suspected to be a hacker or police officer who had previously attempted to become his assistant. CZ warned users to be cautious and advised against adding the number.

data.title: Binance Capital Connect Enhances Institutional Crypto Investment
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, introducing Binance's Capital Connect platform, designed to bridge the gap between trading teams and professional investors in the crypto industry. This dual-sided platform allows qualifying asset managers to raise and manage capital while providing professional investors with a verified channel to discover and allocate to institutional crypto strategies. The article highlights the need for such a platform due to the fragmented and opaque nature of the current infrastructure connecting trading teams and investors.

The article explains that Binance Capital Connect is built within the Binance ecosystem, offering a marketplace for trading teams seeking institutional-grade infrastructure and professional investors looking for standardized performance data. Unlike other platforms that merely attach crypto to traditional finance infrastructure, Capital Connect operates within Binance's existing ecosystem, which includes trading, custody, and compliance workflows. This integration aims to provide a seamless experience for both trading teams and investors, enhancing transparency and structure in crypto manager selection.

For trading teams, raising institutional capital has been challenging due to the lack of established distribution channels and prime broker capital introduction access. Professional investors, on the other hand, have struggled to evaluate actively managed crypto strategies due to the absence of standardized performance data and a clear allocation process. Capital Connect addresses these issues by offering a marketplace where only KYB-verified, licensed portfolio managers can list their strategies. This ensures that investors can engage with greater confidence, knowing that the strategies are organized by type and ranked by performance.

Catherine Chen, Head of Binance VIP & Institutional, emphasized that Capital Connect is a milestone in reducing friction in crypto market infrastructure, making digital assets more accessible for institutional and sophisticated users. The platform is designed for professional investors, including family offices, wealth managers, and high-net-worth entities, seeking structured exposure to actively managed crypto strategies. Investors can browse and filter trading teams by various metrics, review standardized portfolio profiles, and allocate capital through structured processes.

For trading teams, Capital Connect provides access to institutional-grade portfolio infrastructure without the need to build an operational stack independently. Teams can value portfolios using industry-standard NAV methodology, build a verified track record on Binance, and pool capital across multiple investors. The platform ensures that trading teams meet regulatory requirements by holding a valid Asset Management or Portfolio Management license and completing Binance's KYB process.

Capital Connect is built on Binance, the world's largest crypto exchange, offering scale, reach, and regulatory credibility. The platform is integrated within Binance's trading infrastructure, providing trading teams with immediate access to deep liquidity and seamless execution. This integration eliminates the need for third-party execution rails, ensuring that strategy execution, settlement, and capital management occur within a single, frictionless ecosystem. Capital Connect is available to licensed trading teams and professional investors who meet specific eligibility requirements, ensuring a credible distribution channel for institutional capital.

data.title: UK Construction PMI Rises to 45.6 in March, Exceeding Expectations
data.description: The UK's construction sector showed signs of improvement in March, with the Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI) reaching 45.6. According to Jin10, this figure surpassed the anticipated 43.7 and marked an increase from the previous month's 44.5. The data suggests a modest recovery in the construction industry, although the PMI remains below the 50 threshold, indicating contraction. The improvement in March reflects a better-than-expected performance, providing some optimism for the sector's outlook.

data.title: Iranian media reports that the head of the Iranian negotiating delegation has not yet been finalized.
data.description: Iran's Tasnim News Agency reported on the 8th, citing sources, that reports in some media outlets that the head of the Iranian negotiating delegation had been selected were untrue, and the matter had not yet been finalized. (Xinhua)

data.title: Expert Predicts Continued Bear Market Cycle for Ethereum
data.description: Jiang Zhuoer has announced his decision to short Ethereum (ETH) for short- to medium-term trading. According to NS3.AI, Zhuoer believes that the bear market cycle for Ethereum is not yet over, indicating potential challenges ahead for investors.

data.title: Iran Negotiation Team Leader Not Yet Finalized
data.description: According to Odaily, Iran's Tasnim News Agency reported on the 8th that claims about the appointment of the head of Iran's negotiation delegation are inaccurate. The decision has not been finalized, according to informed sources.

data.title: BNB Chain Wallet Addresses Surpass 800 Million
data.description: The number of wallet addresses on the BNB Chain has officially exceeded 800 million. According to ChainCatcher, the network currently hosts millions of users, applications (dApps), and bots actively engaging in on-chain interactions.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong Stock Market Closes with Significant Gains
data.description: The Hong Kong stock market closed with notable gains, as the Hang Seng Index rose by 3.09% and the Technology Index increased by 5.22%. According to Jin10, the semiconductor sector experienced a substantial surge, with Hua Hong Semiconductor (01347.HK) closing up by 14.68% and SMIC (00981.HK) rising by 10.10%.

data.title: Combined Oil Assets Surpass Other Perpetual Contracts on Hyperliquid
data.description: Combined oil assets have seen a significant increase in trading volume on Hyperliquid, surpassing all other perpetual contract products, including Bitcoin. According to Foresight News, this marks a notable shift in trading preferences on the platform.

data.title: ANUBIS Mainnet Launches with Privacy and Compliance Features
data.description:
ANUBIS officially launched its mainnet on April 7 at 8:00 PM EDT, according to ANUBIS's official announcement. According to Odaily, the launch took place at 1:00 AM London time and 8:00 AM Singapore time on April 8.

ANUBIS is a privacy-focused financial public blockchain based on the EVM architecture. It employs a 'selective privacy' model and a ZK-KYC compliance framework to balance privacy protection with on-chain verifiability while remaining compatible with the existing blockchain ecosystem. Following the mainnet launch, ANUBIS aims to build a financial infrastructure that emphasizes both privacy and compliance.

The project will now enter the network operation and ecosystem expansion phase, providing foundational support for applications such as RWA tokenization and institutional-grade payments.

data.title: USDA April Report to Address U.S. Soybean Export Expectations
data.description: The USDA is set to release its April report on April 10 at 0:00 UTC+8. According to Jin10, the report is anticipated to address whether there will be a downward revision in the export expectations for U.S. soybeans, given the absence of large-scale orders. Additionally, the report will highlight other key areas of interest for stakeholders.
